# Coderturtle

Practical field notes, lab scars, and workshop patterns from a cranky, hands-on engineering shell.

Coderturtle is the hands-on builder voice in the Hekton ecosystem, the practical counterpart to Agentic Tekton's architecture/thought-leadership voice. Content here is organized around real projects and their build logs, not blog posts: each project page carries its full timeline, and every build-log entry is individually addressable.

## Projects
- [Coderturtle.io](https://coderturtle.io/projects/coderturtle-io/): The site you're standing on, built in public.

## Recent build-log entries
- [The dark reset: rejecting the schematic pass](https://coderturtle.io/projects/coderturtle-io/log/the-dark-reset/) (2026-07-02, decision): The retro-futurist blueprint pass got rejected outright: too subtle, wrong kind of futuristic, missed the point. Here's the honest log of the reset that followed.
- [Cogs, tilt, and a terminal that talks back to agents](https://coderturtle.io/projects/coderturtle-io/log/cogs-tilt-and-a-terminal-that-talks-to-agents/) (2026-07-02, build): The ecosystem got its own page shaped like actual gears, the workshop floor stopped being flat, and the site learned to describe itself in a format agents can parse instead of just humans.
- [Vibing with ChatGPT](https://coderturtle.io/projects/coderturtle-io/log/vibing-with-chatgpt/) (2025-07-05, build): From concept to turtle-powered Astro site: an impatient engineer, a chatty AI, and the art of vibe-coding.

## Machine-readable
- Project index (JSON): https://coderturtle.io/projects/index.json
- Per-project detail (JSON): append ".json" to any project URL above, e.g. https://coderturtle.io/projects/<slug>.json
- RSS feed (build-log entries): https://coderturtle.io/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://coderturtle.io/sitemap-index.xml

## Provenance
Build-log entries are curated by the site owner, with agent assistance disclosed rather than hidden. An entry may cite internal Hekton change-log ids in its `changeRefs` field as plain references; the internal `.hekton/` control-plane data itself is intentionally not served here.
